answer: The top 5 outliers in Dallas 311 service requests this year are dominated by "Code Concern - CCS" with 6,338 requests, far exceeding others. The next highest are "Consumer Protection Complaint - CCS" with 238 requests and "Single Family Rental Needs Registration - CCS" with 133 requests. Following these are "Restaurant/Food Complaint - CCS" with 39 requests and "Mosquito - Do Not Spray - CCS" with 11 requests. These counts highlight a significant disparity in the volume of requests across categories.
